name: Bombelli Modern Extendable Dining Table Black - Threshold™: Rubberwood, 4-Leg Base, 6 Seats
description:
Finish off your sleek dining area with the functional, contemporary style of this Bombelli Modern Dining Table with Extension Leaf from Threshold™. Featuring a solid-color finish for a striking aesthetic, this modern black dining table brings a touch of minimalist design to your interior, with a simple construction that pairs easily with your existing decor. The four angled legs provide plenty of stability for lasting use — plus, the table features an innovative design that can be extended from the center, helping you expand your table as needed. Maybe you're hosting friends for drinks, or maybe you're sitting down for family dinner. Either way, you'll appreciate the modern practicality of this table.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Depth: 36 inches.
Overall Height: 30 inches.
Overall Width: 72 inches. (extended)
Overall Width: 60 inches. (unextended)
Leaf width: 12 inches
